titleStmt.title: SII 36.260: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 260. (A.R. No. 260 of 1910.) TIRUVAḌANDAI, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Varāha Perumāḷ temple.

summary.p: The Ūrar of Taiyyūr in Kumiḻi-nāḍu, a subdivision of Āmūr-kōṭṭam received 15 kaḻañcus of gold from Nakkanādittan alias Ulōkamāṇikkach Cheṭṭi, a merchant of Koḍungōḷūr in Malai-nāḍu and agreed to pay interest in paddy. The sabhā of Tiruviḍavandai agreed to receive the paddy and to provide food for 30 brāhmaṇas in the temple of Āḻvār at Tiruviḍavanḍai of Paḍuvūr-nāḍu, on the occasion of the first new moon day of every month. The village Kōmaḷam could be identified with Kōvaḷam, a village situated on the north of Tiruvaḍandai.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tirumakaḷ polap perunilac celviyum tanakkeyurimai pūṇṭamai manakko
ḷa kān=taḷūrccālai kalamaṟutaruḷi veṅkai nāṭuṅ kaṅka pāṭiyum nuḷampa pāṭiyum taṭikai vaḻi
yum kuṭamalai nāṭum kollamum kaliṅkamum Eṇṭicai pukaḻtara Īḻamaṇṭalamum tiṇṭi
ṟal veṟṟi taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa tanneḻil vaḷarroḷi Ūḻiyuḷ Ellāyāṇṭum n=toḻuta
kai viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiyarait tecu koḷ śrī kovirājakecarivanmarkku yāṇṭu Iru
pattoṉpatāvatu Āmūrk koṭṭattuk kumiḻi nāṭṭu taiyyūr Ūroṅ kaiyyeḻuttu ma
lai nāṭṭuk koṭuṅkoḷūr viyāpāri nakkanātittanāna Ulokamāṇikka ceṭṭi kaiyyāl yāṅka
ḷ koṇṭu kaṭava pon kācukallāl tuḷainiṟaipon patiṉaiṅkaḻañcu Ippoṉ koṇṭa
paricāvatu Ikkoṭṭattup paṭuvūr nāṭṭut tevatānan=tiruviṭavantai Āḻvār koyilile
y pirāmaṇa pojaṉam Aṭuvataṟkku Ip poṉnāl policai ceka Aṭṭuvatāna nellu
komaḷattil nārācakkāl Aṭṭuvatāna nel Irupattunāṟkalane Irutūṇi patakku
nānāḻi nellum Āṇṭutoṟum can=tirātittavaṟ vāṭākkaṭanāka tiruviṭavantai Āḻvār koyi
lukke paṅkini Uttirat tirunāḷukku munpe Aḷantu kuṭuttu tevarkanmikaḷ Eḻuttināl tara
vu koḷvomānom Ipparicu ceyyātuviṭil tanmāsanattil nicatam nālekāl kā
ṇan=taṇṭapaṭuvatāka Oṭṭi Iṭṭuk kuṭuttom taiyyūr Ūrom Ittaṇṭappaṭṭum
Innellu vaḻuvāme Aḷappatānom taiyyūr Ūrom tiruviṭavantai sapaiyom I
nnellu Irupattunāṟkalane Irutūṇi patakku nānāḻi nellum kaiyyuṟṟu tiṅkaḷ talai
uvātitoṟum pirāhmaṇar muppatinmarai Ūṭṭum paricāvatu pirāhmaṇan Oruvanukku Arici nā
ḻi muḻakkāka Arici tūṇipatakku nānāḻi Urikkum Añciraṇṭu vaṇṇattāl nellu
kalanetūṇi muṉnāḻi Uḻakkum kaṟikku nelluk kuṟuṇi nānāḻiyum ney Urikkum nellum
patakkum morukku nellu Aññāḻimuḻakkum veṟṟilaikkum pākkukkum nellukkuṟuṇiyum
Aṭuvār Iruvarkku nelluk kuṟuṇi nānāḻiyum Uppukku nellu Irunāḻiyum kalamiṭuṅ kucavanukku
nelluk kuṟuṇiyum viṟakiṭuvān Oruvanukku nellu nānāḻiyum Āka nāḷ Oṉṟinukku nellu Iru ka
lane Ēḻunāḻiyāka Innellu Irupattunāṟkalane Irutūṇi patakku nānāḻiyum kaikkoṇṭu pi
rāhmaṇarai Ūṭṭuvatānom tiruviṭavantai sapaiyom Ittaṉmam śrīvayiṣṇava rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 36.260 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
